name: @midnight-experiments/ecdsa-integration-tests
description: End-to-end proof for the ecdsa experiment on a live local stack: deploys the attestation contract with a pinned secp256k1 key, posts an ECDSA-signed attestation under REAL ZKIR v3 proving, and reads the authenticated record back off the indexer. Gated by RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS; run `yarn compile:zk` in the contract package first.
